config.asyncparticles.tick.particleLimit:
Set the maximum number of
particles per ParticleRenderType.
config.asyncparticles.tick.particleLight:
Enable caching of particle
lighting for performance.
config.asyncparticles.tick.asyncAnimatio:
Choose execution mode
for async animation ticking.
config.asyncparticles.tick.asyncParticle:
Select behavior for
async particle ticking.
config.asyncparticles.tick.failPerSecLim:
Max number of tick failures
allowed per second for each
particle class or end-tick op.
Exceeding this will follow the
'Fail Behavior' rule.
Action to take when failure
rate exceeds the limit.
config.asyncparticles.tick.suppressCME.t:
Ignore ConcurrentModificationException-s
while under 'Fail Per Second Limit'.
config.asyncparticles.rendering.failPerS:
Maximum rendering failures
per second allowed per particle
class. Exceeding this will follow
the 'Fail Behavior' setting.
config.asyncparticles.rendering.failBeha:
Action taken when rendering
failures exceed the limit.
config.asyncparticles.mod-compat.valkyri:
Control when rain effects
appear on Valkyrien Skies ships.

Fix lighting issues with
particles on ships.
Control when rain effects
spawn on Create contraptions.
config.asyncparticles.error.cloth-config:
Install Cloth Config API to
access configuration options.
